purpose: Shared library sourced by bootstrap.sh and every module; defines logging, detection, idempotent install helpers, manifest upsert logic, and agent-discovery file writers — never executes on its own.
invariants: REPO_ROOT must be exported by the caller before this file is sourced
Sourcing this file must have no side effects — only definitions
apt_install is idempotent: calling it for already-installed packages does no network work
manifest_add upserts by name, never creates duplicates in tools.json
DRY_RUN=1 causes all mutating operations to log their intent and return without acting
gotchas: _APT_UPDATED is module-global state; reset it to 0 before forcing a fresh apt-get update
manifest_add captures installed_version via the detect command at write time — stale if tool upgrades later
ensure_block uses HTML-comment fences; markers must be globally unique across all callers of the same file
backup_file is called implicitly by ensure_line and ensure_block — do not call both independently on the same file in the same run
npm_global sets a global npm prefix (~/.local) as a side effect on first call

key_functions.name: apt_install
key_functions.summary: Installs only missing apt packages, calling apt_refresh at most once per shell session

key_functions.name: pipx_install
key_functions.summary: Installs a Python CLI into an isolated pipx venv, skipping if already present

key_functions.name: npm_global
key_functions.summary: Installs a global npm CLI into ~/.local prefix without sudo, idempotently

key_functions.name: manifest_add
key_functions.summary: Upserts a tool entry into manifest/tools.json, capturing the current installed version via the detect command

key_functions.name: ensure_block
key_functions.summary: Idempotently maintains an HTML-comment-fenced block in a file, replacing it in-place or appending if absent

key_functions.name: is_wsl
key_functions.summary: Returns 0 if running inside WSL by checking /proc/version for 'Microsoft'; used to gate WSL-specific code paths

key_functions.name: write_agent_discovery
key_functions.summary: Writes install-rules and tool-inventory guidance referencing ai-dev-envbuild into ~/AGENTS.md and ~/CLAUDE.md via marker-fenced blocks

key_functions.name: verify_sha256
key_functions.summary: Checks a file's SHA256 against an expected value; warns and returns 0 if expected is empty, errors if mismatched
